Cookie Policy

Last updated: 18 February 2026

This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how they may be used on the Cravelle website (cravelle.co), and how You can manage Your cookie preferences.

1. What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files that are stored on Your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when You visit a website. They are widely used to make websites function properly, improve user experience, and provide information to website operators.

In addition to cookies, websites may use similar technologies such as local storage (localStorage) to store small amounts of data on Your device.

2. How This Website Uses Cookies and Local Storage

Strictly Necessary / Functional Storage

This website uses localStorage (a browser-based storage mechanism) for the following functional purposes:

  • Theme preference: We store Your selected theme (light, dark, or system) in localStorage so that the website displays consistently with Your preference across page visits. This data is stored locally on Your device and is not transmitted to our servers.
  • Language preference: We store Your selected language in localStorage to display content in Your preferred language. This data remains on Your device.

These storage items are strictly functional and necessary for the website to operate according to Your preferences. They do not track You, identify You personally, or transmit data to any third party.

Third-Party Resources

This website loads resources from third-party services to provide fonts, icons, and mapping functionality:

  • Google Fonts (fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com) – for typography. Google may set cookies or collect technical data when serving font files.
  • Cloudflare CDN (cdnjs.cloudflare.com) – for icon libraries. Cloudflare may use cookies for security and performance purposes.
  • Leaflet / OpenStreetMap (unpkg.com, tile servers) – for interactive maps. The map tile provider may collect access logs.
  • Formspree – for contact form submissions. Formspree processes form data as described in their privacy policy.

We do not control the cookies or data collection practices of these third-party services. We encourage You to review the privacy and cookie policies of these providers for further information.

3. What We Do Not Use

This website does not use:

  • Analytics or tracking cookies (e.g. Google Analytics, Hotjar);
  • Advertising or marketing cookies (e.g. Meta Pixel, Google Ads);
  • Social media tracking pixels;
  • Newsletter tracking tools;
  • Any first-party cookies for profiling, behavioural tracking, or targeted advertising.

Because we do not use marketing or analytics cookies, we do not display a cookie consent banner. If this changes in future, we will update this policy and implement appropriate consent mechanisms.

4. Managing Cookies in Your Browser

You can control and manage cookies and local storage through Your browser settings. Most browsers allow You to:

  • View the cookies and local storage data that have been set;
  • Delete cookies and local storage data (individually or in bulk);
  • Block cookies from specific or all websites;
  • Set preferences for third-party cookies.

Please note that blocking or deleting cookies and local storage may affect the functionality of this website, such as Your theme and language preferences being reset.

For instructions on managing cookies in common browsers:

  • Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies and other site data
  • Firefox: Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
  • Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
  • Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions

5. Changes to This Cookie Policy

We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. If we introduce non-essential cookies in future, we will update this policy accordingly and implement a consent mechanism where required by law.

Contact

If You have questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact: cravelle.co@protonmail.com
